bio: Technology leader focused on reliability, scalable operations, and building high-trust teams. I align platform investments to business outcomes, reduce operational risk, and improve delivery velocity through disciplined operating rhythms, automation, and clear accountability.

cta.heading: Ready to Build Resilient Systems?
cta.body: Whether it is improving reliability, reducing toil, or building high-trust teams that handle incidents well, let’s build something resilient together.

stats.label: Reliability Leadership
stats.caption: Blameless, fast, and focused on learning.

stats.label: Cloud Infra
stats.caption: Cloud foundations, platform maturity, and scalable operations.

stats.label: Toil Avoided
stats.caption: Automate the boring. Measure the important.
